arts.ttl: Premier League reject Manchester City request to escalate tension between pair
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola is upset with the Premier League but has also made clear his anger with FIFA after their Club World Cup demands

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Mo Salah contract update as Arne Slot gives players Man City challenge
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah's contract situation is still in the spotlight, with the Liverpool forward now linked with Paris Saint-Germain ahead of his deal expiring in June

arts.ttl: I saw Pep Guardiola's anger at the Premier League and FIFA - it could be good news for Man City
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola held no prisoners in his pre-match press conference on Friday, making it abundantly clear where his loyalties lay.

arts.ttl: De Bruyne, Rodri, Ake - Man City injury news and return dates ahead of Fulham clash
arts.sum: All of the latest injury news as Man City prepare to host Fulham in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Man City v Fulham: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Man City v Fulham: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Man City star Kevin De Bruyne asked to miss Belgium games to manage his game time amid injury struggles, reveals Domenico Tedesco
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne has asked to be left out of Belgium's upcoming games, coach Domenico Tedesco has revealed.

arts.ttl: Man City out to equal club-record unbeaten run in Fulham clash
arts.sum: Manchester City will have the chance to extend a club-record unbeaten streak when they face Fulham in Saturday's Premier League clash at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: I'm always reviewing my passing game, says Ederson
arts.sum: “The key for me in this aspect is keeping calm and visualising plays before they happen, seeing the possibilities of trying to pass to teammates because 95% of the time one of my team-mates are going to be free.” The Brazilian goalkeeper has revolutionised the position at the top of the game with an incredible skill for picking out team-mates and starting attacks.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola has pop at the Premier League over refusal to delay Man City's start to season as Club World Cup awaits
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: Its final comes just four weeks before the season begins. In fact, City could have as little as seven days to prepare for their opening game after a mandated three-week summer break.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola: Premier League will not delay Man City games after Club World Cup
arts.sum: City fear burnout among their squad owing to their heavy schedule.
